architecture-backlog-spec.description: Reusable structure for maintaining a parallel preserved-ideas document alongside an architecture overview. Apply when architectural decisions are being made faster than they can be fully integrated and the cost of losing context is high.

architecture-overview-spec.description: Reusable structure for a comprehensive architecture overview document. Aimed at producing a starting point for new technical readers and a reference for ongoing decision-making.

architecture-self-review-spec.description: Discipline for critically reviewing your own architecture document before the user has to. Run at milestones to find gaps before handoff.

iterative-architecture-conversation-spec.description: Disciplines for collaborative iterative architecture definition over many turns with a user. Apply when decisions accumulate over many exchanges and the user is treating the agent as a thinking partner.

skill-manager-spec.description: Pre-v1 specification for the v2 graphical Skill Registry Manager. Preserved as a skill-spec input to the v2 work; superseded by /ai/skill-management-v1.md for v1 purposes.

use-cases-spec.description: Companion document to skill-manager-spec describing the standard user workflows (UC1-UC7) of the v2 graphical Skill Registry Manager. Reviewable independently from the main spec.
